title: Kick the Ranat
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name="Kick the Ranat" |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer=[[The Palpatones]]{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Song]] |pages= |published in= |genre= }} "'''Kick the Ranat'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] performed as a hit single by [[The Palpatones]], a band formed by [[Greeata Jendowanian/Legends|Greeata Jendowanian]], [[Rystáll Sant/Legends|Rystáll Sant]], and [[Joh Yowza/Legends|Joh Yowza]] after the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY's]] [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Because of Jendowanian's beautiful voice, the band became an [[The galaxy/Legends|intergalactic]] sensation—also enjoying limited success in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}—through "Kick the Ranat," before Sant left the band. The song shared its name with the [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] [[Species/Legends|species]].[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races'', Second Edition]] ==Behind the scenes== "Kick the Ranat" was introduced in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} On [[January 21]], [[2014]], [[Edward M. Erdelac]] wrote "[[Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away]], Part 2," on [[StarWars.com]]. In that article, "Kick the Ranat" was again mentioned and was spelled as "Kick The Ranat." This article assumes the original "Kick the Ranat" spelling from "Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band" is correct. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stm}} *{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} {{ID|"Kick The Ranat"}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kick the Ranat |nl=Kick the Ranat }} [[Category:Songs]]
